# crates/attractor-agent

Autonomous coding agent implementation coordinating LLM inference with tool execution. Houses `AgentSession` lifecycle management, `FidelityMode` history truncation, `LoopDetector` repetitive call detection, `SystemPromptBuilder` modular prompt assembly, and `SubagentManager` child process orchestration.

## Contents

### Core Session

- [Cargo.toml](./Cargo.toml): Package manifest declaring dependencies on `attractor-llm`, `attractor-tools`, `attractor-types`, `serde`, `tokio`, `uuid`.
- [src/lib.rs](./src/lib.rs): `AgentSession` orchestrator exposing `process_input`, `build_request`, `execute_tool_calls`; defines `SessionConfig`, `SessionState`, `Turn` enum, `MAX_TOOL_OUTPUT_LEN`.

### Conversation Controls

- [src/fidelity.rs](./src/fidelity.rs): `FidelityMode` enum (`Full`, `Truncate`, `Compact`, `Summary`) and `apply_fidelity` processor for history truncation strategies.
- [src/loop_detection.rs](./src/loop_detection.rs): `LoopDetector` sliding window detection (`window_size`, `recent_calls`) and `SteeringInjector` corrective message generation.

### Prompt System

- [src/prompt_builder.rs](./src/prompt_builder.rs): `SystemPromptBuilder` priority-based assembler (priorities 0-5) with `with_base`, `with_goal`, `with_tools`, `build`; `discover_project_docs` searches candidate files; `ProjectDoc` struct.

### Subagent Management

- [src/subagent.rs](./src/subagent.rs): `SubagentManager` registry with `register` (yields `subagent-N` IDs), `update_status`, `running_agents`; `SubagentConfig` spawn parameters; `SubagentStatus` lifecycle enum.

### Testing

- [src/test_utils.rs](./src/test_utils.rs): `MockEnv` stub implementing `ExecutionEnvironment`; `SequenceMockProvider` mock `ProviderAdapter`; `EchoTool` test `Tool` implementation; `make_client` helper constructing `attractor_llm::LlmClient`.

## Architecture / Data Flow

`AgentSession::process_input` validates `max_turns` via `TurnLimitReached` error, loops `process_single_input` draining `followup_queue` FIFO until empty. Each input cycle runs up to `SessionConfig::max_tool_rounds` tool rounds. `build_request` assembles LLM payload: prepends system prompt constructed via `SystemPromptBuilder` (sections sorted by priority), applies `FidelityMode` truncation to history slice via `apply_fidelity`, maps `Turn` variants to LLM message types. LLM response yields tool calls; `execute_tool_calls` invokes `ToolRegistry` sequentially, truncating outputs exceeding `MAX_TOOL_OUTPUT_LEN` with warning suffix. Between rounds, `drain_steering` converts `steering_queue` to `Turn::Steering` entries. `LoopDetector::record_and_check` monitors call signatures; detected loops enqueue `SteeringInjector` warning messages. Subagents spawn externally via `SubagentManager::register`, tracking status transitions in internal `HashMap`.

## API Surface

**Core Session**: `AgentSession::new`, `AgentSession::process_input`, `AgentSession::steer`, `AgentSession::follow_up`, `AgentSession::id`, `AgentSession::state`, `AgentSession::history`.

**Configuration & State**: `SessionConfig` (struct with `model`, `max_turns`, `max_tool_rounds`, `enable_loop_detection`, `loop_detection_window`), `SessionState` (enum: `Idle`, `Processing`, `AwaitingInput`, `Closed`), `Turn` (enum variants: `User`, `Assistant`, `ToolResults`, `System`, `Steering`), `ToolResultEntry`.

**Fidelity**: `FidelityMode` (enum: `Full`, `Truncate { keep_last }`, `Compact`, `Summary`), `apply_fidelity`.

**Loop Detection**: `LoopDetector::new`, `LoopDetector::record_and_check`, `SteeringInjector::loop_detected_message`, `SteeringInjector::refocus_message`.

**Prompt Building**: `SystemPromptBuilder::new`, `SystemPromptBuilder::with_base`, `SystemPromptBuilder::with_goal`, `SystemPromptBuilder::with_node_prompt`, `SystemPromptBuilder::with_tools`, `SystemPromptBuilder::with_project_docs`, `SystemPromptBuilder::with_context`, `SystemPromptBuilder::build`, `discover_project_docs`, `ProjectDoc`.

**Subagents**: `SubagentManager::new`, `SubagentManager::register`, `SubagentManager::update_status`, `SubagentManager::is_running`, `SubagentManager::running_agents`, `SubagentManager::status`, `SubagentManager::count`, `SubagentConfig`, `SubagentStatus`.

## Behavioral Contracts

**Fidelity Parsing**: `FidelityMode::parse` matches lowercase input against `"full"`, `"compact"`, `"summary"`, or prefix `"truncate"`. Accepts syntax `"truncate:N"` or `"truncate(N)"` with optional whitespace; bare `"truncate"` defaults `keep_last: 50`. Unknown inputs default to `Full`.

**History Truncation**: `apply_fidelity` with `Truncate { keep_last }` returns `messages[messages.len() - keep_last..].to_vec()` when `messages.len() > keep_last`, else returns `messages.to_vec()`. `Compact` and `Summary` currently passthrough without modification.

**Tool Output Truncation**: Hard limit `30_000` characters. Suffix template: `"\n\n[WARNING: Output truncated. {} characters removed.]"` where `{}` calculates `original_len - 30_000`.

**Loop Detection Signatures**: Format `"{}:{}"` concatenating `tool_name` and `u64` hash from `DefaultHasher::write(args.to_string().as_bytes())`. Detection triggers when `recent_calls.len() >= window_size` and all elements equal first signature.

**Steering Message Templates**:

- Loop warning: `"WARNING: You have called the '{}' tool {} times in a row with the same arguments. This appears to be a loop. Please try a different approach or tool."`
- Refocus: `"Please refocus on the current goal: {}. Consider what steps are still needed and take a different approach."`

**Prompt Section Priorities**: `0` base (renders without heading), `1` Goal (`# Goal`), `2` Task (`# Task`), `3` Available Tools (`# Available Tools`), `4` Project Context (`# Project Context: {source}`), `5` Context Variables (`# Context Variables`). Final format: `"# {}\n\n{}"` per section (except priority 0), joined by `"\n\n"`.

**Project Doc Truncation**: `10_000` byte maximum; exceeded content truncated to first 10,000 bytes plus suffix `"...\n\n(truncated)"`. Searches candidates sequentially: `[".pas/CLAUDE.md", "CLAUDE.md", "README.md", ".cursorrules", ".github/copilot-instructions.md", "CONTRIBUTING.md"]`.

**Subagent ID Format**: `"subagent-{}"` interpolated with sequential `usize` counter starting at `0`.

**Default Constants**: `model` defaults to `"claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929"`, `max_tool_rounds` to `200`, `default_command_timeout_ms` to `10_000`, `loop_detection_window` to `10`, `enable_loop_detection` to `true`, `MAX_TOOL_OUTPUT_LEN` to `30_000`.

## File Relationships

`lib.rs` re-exports all modules publicly: `fidelity`, `loop_detection`, `prompt_builder`, `subagent`, `test_utils`. `AgentSession` composes `FidelityMode` via `apply_fidelity` call in `build_request`, uses `LoopDetector` (when `enable_loop_detection` true) to monitor tool calls, and constructs prompts via `SystemPromptBuilder`. `subagent.rs` defines types consumed by external spawn logic. `test_utils.rs` depends on `attractor_llm` types (`LlmClient`, `Request`, `Response`, `ProviderAdapter`) and `attractor_tools` traits (`Tool`, `ExecutionEnvironment`).

## Patterns

**Builder Pattern**: `SystemPromptBuilder` chains `with_*` methods (consuming `self`) accumulating `PromptSection` entries, finalizing via `build()` which sorts by `priority: u8` and renders formatted output.

**State Machines**: `SessionState` tracks session lifecycle (`Idle` → `Processing` → `AwaitingInput` → `Idle`). `SubagentStatus` tracks child health (`Running`, `Completed(String)`, `Failed(String)`).

**Sliding Window Detection**: `LoopDetector` maintains `VecDeque<String>` (`recent_calls`) bounded to `window_size`; detects uniform fills where all signatures match (`iter().all(|s| s == first)`).

**Registry Pattern**: `SubagentManager` wraps `HashMap<String, SubagentStatus>` with sequential ID generation (`next_id: usize`), providing CRUD operations for subagent tracking.

## Stack

Rust workspace crate. Key external dependencies: `attractor_llm` (LLM client interface, `LlmClient`, `Request`, `Response`), `attractor_tools` (`Tool` trait, `ExecutionEnvironment`, `ToolRegistry`), `attractor_types` (error types, `Result`). Runtime dependencies include `serde_json` (argument serialization), `tracing` (structured logging), `tokio` (async runtime), `uuid` (session ID generation), `thiserror`, `async-trait`, `futures-core`, `tokio-stream`, `tempfile="3"`.
